title: Death and Rebirth Intermission Music
wikitext:
[]: Death and Rebirth: Intermission Music             Quote Post by iamsynch » Sat Oct 24, 2009 10:45 pm What's the name of the trumpet-full piece at the end of death and rebirth?

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sat Oct 24, 2009 10:56 pm Canon in D dur or something like that I believe isnt it?

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Sat Oct 24, 2009 11:55 pm Nope, I think he means the tango-like piece at the *very* end of the intermission music. I asked this question myself a while back, one moment while I pull it up... http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6296&highlight= Voila!

[]:             Quote Post by iamsynch » Sun Oct 25, 2009 11:02 am Thank you!
